suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

Read Time

Key Concepts

  • 1

    Automated Grading Systems

    How AI models are being utilized to grade essays, short answers, and multiple-choice questions with high precision, saving educators significant time.

  • 2

    Personalized Learning Paths

    The use of predictive analytics to tailor educational content to the specific learning pace and style of individual students.

  • 3

    Ethical Considerations and Bias

    Challenges surrounding data privacy, algorithmic bias, and the potential widening of the digital divide in educational contexts.
